articles.title: Pentagon’s ‘Immaculate Constellation’ Allegations Ignite New UFO Disclosure Firestorm In Congress
articles.summary: Whistleblower claims introduced in a House Oversight hearing in November 2024 allege that a secret program called “Immaculate Constellation” is an AI‑driven system that ingests global multispectral surveillance data and removes anomalous images before they reach the broader military intelligence community. The alleged program is described as an unacknowledged Special Access Program that centralizes classified UAP footage, sensor data, satellite imagery, and encounter reports, and is said to have operated outside normal congressional oversight for years.

en.title: Pentagon’s ‘Immaculate Constellation’ Allegations Ignite New UFO Disclosure Firestorm In Congress
en.summary: Whistleblower claims introduced in a House Oversight hearing in November 2024 allege that a secret program called “Immaculate Constellation” is an AI‑driven system that ingests global multispectral surveillance data and removes anomalous images before they reach the broader military intelligence community. The alleged program is described as an unacknowledged Special Access Program that centralizes classified UAP footage, sensor data, satellite imagery, and encounter reports, and is said to have operated outside normal congressional oversight for years.

de.title: Die Anschuldigungen des Pentagons wegen der „Unbefleckten Konstellation“ entfachen im Kongress einen neuen Feuersturm zur Enthüllung von UFOs
de.summary: Whistleblower-Behauptungen, die in einer Anhörung zur Aufsicht des Repräsentantenhauses im November 2024 vorgebracht wurden, behaupten, dass es sich bei einem geheimen Programm namens „Immaculate Constellation“ um ein KI-gesteuertes System handelt, das globale multispektrale Überwachungsdaten aufnimmt und anomale Bilder entfernt, bevor sie die breitere militärische Geheimdienstgemeinschaft erreichen. Das angebliche Programm wird als unbestätigtes Sonderzugriffsprogramm beschrieben, das geheime UAP-Aufnahmen, Sensordaten, Satellitenbilder und Begegnungsberichte zentralisiert und angeblich jahrelang außerhalb der normalen Kontrolle des Kongresses operiert hat.

articles.summary: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reacted to US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf those already released, saying he believes every word of the warning. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first set of 162 documents was only a “drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming” with future releases.

de.title: Der Illusionist Uri Geller reagiert auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten vor der nächsten Reihe von UFO-Dateien: „Heiliger Mist kommt“
de.summary: Der israelisch-britische Illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reagierte auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten Tim Burchett, dass die nächste Ladung freigegebener UFO-Dateien die bereits freigegebenen in den Schatten stellen werde, und sagte, er glaube jedes Wort der Warnung. Burchett, ein Mitglied des UAP Caucus, sagte Joe Rogan, dass der erste Satz von 162 Dokumenten nur ein „Tropfen auf den heißen Stein“ sei und dass mit zukünftigen Veröffentlichungen „heiliger Mist kommt“.

articles.title: UFO Zips Over House And Beams Up A Human? Internet Discusses The Viral Alien Abduction Footage [WATCH]
articles.summary: A video posted on X/Twitter on May 14, 2026 shows two unidentified flying objects zipping over houses and a figure appearing to be beamed up, but the footage is low quality and many viewers question its authenticity. Netizens offered mixed reactions: some suggested the objects could be seagulls, others argued the movement patterns were inconsistent with real UFO behavior and labeled the clip as fabricated. One commenter claimed the footage was neither fake nor AI‑generated, though no independent verification was provided.

en.title: UFO Zips Over House And Beams Up A Human? Internet Discusses The Viral Alien Abduction Footage [WATCH]
en.summary: A video posted on X/Twitter on May 14, 2026 shows two unidentified flying objects zipping over houses and a figure appearing to be beamed up, but the footage is low quality and many viewers question its authenticity. Netizens offered mixed reactions: some suggested the objects could be seagulls, others argued the movement patterns were inconsistent with real UFO behavior and labeled the clip as fabricated. One commenter claimed the footage was neither fake nor AI‑generated, though no independent verification was provided.

de.title: UFO rast über Haus hinweg und beamt einen Menschen hoch? Internet diskutiert das virale Filmmaterial zur Entführung durch Außerirdische [ANSCHAUEN]
de.summary: Ein am 14. Mai 2026 auf X/Twitter veröffentlichtes Video zeigt zwei nicht identifizierte Flugobjekte, die über Häuser hinwegfliegen, und eine scheinbar hochgebeamte Gestalt. Das Filmmaterial ist jedoch von schlechter Qualität und viele Zuschauer bezweifeln seine Authentizität. Die Reaktionen der Internetnutzer waren gemischt: Einige schlugen vor, dass es sich bei den Objekten um Möwen handeln könnte, andere meinten, die Bewegungsmuster stünden nicht im Einklang mit dem echten UFO-Verhalten und bezeichneten den Clip als erfunden. Ein Kommentator behauptete, das Filmmaterial sei weder gefälscht noch KI-generiert, obwohl keine unabhängige Bestätigung vorgelegt wurde.

articles.title: UFO files | In pursuit of pies in the sky
articles.summary: S. Department of War released 162 declassified documents, photos and videos on unidentified anomalous phenomena under President Donald Trump, with further releases planned through the PURSUE program. The release involves the White House, NASA, FBI, Office of the Director of National Intelligence and the All‑Domain Anomaly Resolution Office, and includes footage of UAPs over Greece, Iraq, the UAE and a football‑shaped object near Japan.

de.title: UFO-Dateien | Auf der Suche nach Kuchen im Himmel
de.summary: Das US-Kriegsministerium veröffentlichte unter Präsident Donald Trump 162 freigegebene Dokumente, Fotos und Videos zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen. Weitere Veröffentlichungen sind im Rahmen des PURSUE-Programms geplant. An der Veröffentlichung sind das Weiße Haus, die NASA, das FBI, das Büro des Direktors des Nationalen Geheimdienstes und das All-Domain Anomaly Resolution Office beteiligt. Sie umfasst Aufnahmen von UAPs über Griechenland, dem Irak, den Vereinigten Arabischen Emiraten und einem fußballförmigen Objekt in der Nähe von Japan.

summaries.file-release-bright-lights-and-hot-orbs-: The U.S. government released 17 pages of previously classified Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena documents on May 8, as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, with more files to be issued on a rolling basis. Florida has reported 8,872 UFO sightings since 1995, the second‑highest total in the nation, and the state has been the site of several notable incidents, including a 1944 P‑38 aircraft encounter, a 1967 Cuban Jet Incident involving radar operators, the 1987‑88 Gulf Breeze Six photographs, the 2012 Homestead Golden Knights event, a 2018 satellite image over Pratt & Whitney, and a 2021 Flagler County video. Many of these sightings have been later explained or debunked: the Gulf Breeze photos were shown to be a hoax involving a foam model, the Golden Knights were identified as a parachutist team using flares, and the Pratt & Whitney image was likely a stealth drone or test rig. Pentagon AARO director Sean Kirkpatrick and NASA official Dan Evans have stated that, to date, no credible evidence of extraterrestrial activity or off‑world technology has been found in UAP reports. The remaining uncertainty lies in the interpretation of the released documents and the unexplained nature of some sightings.
summaries.pentagon-s-immaculate-constellation-alle: Whistleblower claims introduced in a House Oversight hearing in November 2024 allege that a secret program called “Immaculate Constellation” is an AI‑driven system that ingests global multispectral surveillance data and removes anomalous images before they reach the broader military intelligence community. The alleged program is described as an unacknowledged Special Access Program that centralizes classified UAP footage, sensor data, satellite imagery, and encounter reports, and is said to have operated outside normal congressional oversight for years. Pentagon spokesperson Sue Gough and former AARO director Sean Kirkpatrick have denied the existence of such a program, but congressional members from both parties are demanding greater transparency into UAP investigations, defense spending, and compartmentalized aerospace programs. Hearing materials cite specific incidents, such as aircraft being boxed by unidentified spheres and a glowing object near a Navy carrier group, but no publicly released evidence has independently verified these claims. The All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) has investigated UAP incidents and found no evidence of extraterrestrial technology, yet critics argue it may lack access to the most deeply compartmentalized programs if they exist. If the allegations are accurate, the controversy could trigger audits, inspector general probes, and potential criminal investigations into misuse of federal funds or unlawful concealment from Congress.
summaries.illusionist-uri-geller-reacts-to-us-cong: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reacted to US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf those already released, saying he believes every word of the warning. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first set of 162 documents was only a “drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming” with future releases. He cited reports of pilots being pulled from duty for psychological evaluation after UAP encounters, and alleged sightings of underwater craft moving over 200 mph and as large as a football field. Geller tweeted that in the 1970s he was shown fragments of metal from a crashed UFO by rocket scientist Wernher von Braun, and that he later saw non‑human bodies stored at NASA’s Goddard Space Center. He claims the already released files, which include Apollo and Gemini mission reports of strange lights and objects, validate his long‑standing assertions and hopes the forthcoming documents will expose NASA’s full involvement.
summaries.film-new-documentary-follows-journalist-: Journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell discusses his new documentary with NBC News correspondent Gadi Schwartz. The documentary is titled “Sleeping Dog.” It explores Corbell’s navigation of government secrecy. It also covers whistleblowers and his search for truth about UFOs.
summaries.ufo-zips-over-house-and-beams-up-a-human: A video posted on X/Twitter on May 14, 2026 shows two unidentified flying objects zipping over houses and a figure appearing to be beamed up, but the footage is low quality and many viewers question its authenticity. Netizens offered mixed reactions: some suggested the objects could be seagulls, others argued the movement patterns were inconsistent with real UFO behavior and labeled the clip as fabricated. One commenter claimed the footage was neither fake nor AI‑generated, though no independent verification was provided. The article notes that declassified UAP data released by the U.S. government, including 162 files, has yet to contain any confirmed abduction media. The piece references the historical context of close encounters, noting that CE4 incidents involve human abduction, but no such events have been documented in the released archives.
summaries.ufo-files-in-pursuit-of-pies-in-the-sky: On May 8 the U.S. Department of War released 162 declassified documents, photos and videos on unidentified anomalous phenomena under President Donald Trump, with further releases planned through the PURSUE program. The release involves the White House, NASA, FBI, Office of the Director of National Intelligence and the All‑Domain Anomaly Resolution Office, and includes footage of UAPs over Greece, Iraq, the UAE and a football‑shaped object near Japan. Most of the files are heavily redacted—108 contain black masking and four were retracted—according to the Pentagon to protect eyewitness identities, facility locations and unrelated sensitive military information. AARO’s 2024 report added hundreds of new UAP sightings but found no confirmation of alien technology, and a second report is expected soon with low expectations for new revelations. The release has drawn criticism that it fuels speculation and that the Trump administration’s transparency is limited, while the site received over 340 million hits in the first half‑day, reaching more than 97 % of the U.S. population.

en.title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
en.summary: S. government released 17 pages of previously classified Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena documents on May 8, as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, with more files to be issued on a rolling basis.

de.title: Helle Lichter und heiße Kugeln: UFO-Akten geben Aufschluss über Sichtungen, überlassen die Interpretation jedoch der Öffentlichkeit
de.summary: Die Regierung von S. veröffentlichte am 8. Mai im Rahmen des Präsidenten-Entsiegelungs- und Meldesystems für UAP-Begegnungen 17 Seiten zuvor geheimer Dokumente zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen. Weitere Dateien werden fortlaufend herausgegeben.

en.title: Pentagon’s ‘Immaculate Constellation’ Allegations Ignite New UFO Disclosure Firestorm In Congress
en.summary: Whistleblower claims introduced in a House Oversight hearing in November 2024 allege that a secret program called “Immaculate Constellation” is an AI‑driven system that ingests global multispectral surveillance data and removes anomalous images before they reach the broader military intelligence community. The alleged program is described as an unacknowledged Special Access Program that centralizes classified UAP footage, sensor data, satellite imagery, and encounter reports, and is said to have operated outside normal congressional oversight for years.

de.title: Die Anschuldigungen des Pentagons wegen der „Unbefleckten Konstellation“ entfachen im Kongress einen neuen Feuersturm zur Enthüllung von UFOs
de.summary: Whistleblower-Behauptungen, die in einer Anhörung zur Aufsicht des Repräsentantenhauses im November 2024 vorgebracht wurden, behaupten, dass es sich bei einem geheimen Programm namens „Immaculate Constellation“ um ein KI-gesteuertes System handelt, das globale multispektrale Überwachungsdaten aufnimmt und anomale Bilder entfernt, bevor sie die breitere militärische Geheimdienstgemeinschaft erreichen. Das angebliche Programm wird als unbestätigtes Sonderzugriffsprogramm beschrieben, das geheime UAP-Aufnahmen, Sensordaten, Satellitenbilder und Begegnungsberichte zentralisiert und angeblich jahrelang außerhalb der normalen Kontrolle des Kongresses operiert hat.

en.title: Illusionist Uri Geller Reacts To US Congressman's Warning Over Next Set Of UFO Files: 'Holy Crap Is Coming'
en.summary: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reacted to US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf those already released, saying he believes every word of the warning. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first set of 162 documents was only a “drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming” with future releases.

de.title: Der Illusionist Uri Geller reagiert auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten vor der nächsten Reihe von UFO-Dateien: „Heiliger Mist kommt“
de.summary: Der israelisch-britische Illusionist Uri Geller, 79, reagierte auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten Tim Burchett, dass die nächste Ladung freigegebener UFO-Dateien die bereits freigegebenen in den Schatten stellen werde, und sagte, er glaube jedes Wort der Warnung. Burchett, ein Mitglied des UAP Caucus, sagte Joe Rogan, dass der erste Satz von 162 Dokumenten nur ein „Tropfen auf den heißen Stein“ sei und dass mit zukünftigen Veröffentlichungen „heiliger Mist kommt“.

en.title: New documentary follows journalist Jeremy Corbell’s hunt for the truth on UFOs
en.summary: Journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell discusses his new documentary with NBC News correspondent Gadi Schwartz. The documentary is titled “Sleeping Dog.” It explores Corbell’s navigation of government secrecy. It also covers whistleblowers and his search for truth about UFOs.

de.title: Neuer Dokumentarfilm folgt der Suche des Journalisten Jeremy Corbell nach der Wahrheit über UFOs
de.summary: Der Journalist und Filmemacher Jeremy Corbell bespricht seinen neuen Dokumentarfilm mit NBC News-Korrespondent Gadi Schwartz. Der Dokumentarfilm trägt den Titel „Sleeping Dog“. Es untersucht Corbells Umgang mit Regierungsgeheimnissen. Es geht auch um Whistleblower und seine Suche nach der Wahrheit über UFOs.

en.title: UFO Zips Over House And Beams Up A Human? Internet Discusses The Viral Alien Abduction Footage [WATCH]
en.summary: A video posted on X/Twitter on May 14, 2026 shows two unidentified flying objects zipping over houses and a figure appearing to be beamed up, but the footage is low quality and many viewers question its authenticity. Netizens offered mixed reactions: some suggested the objects could be seagulls, others argued the movement patterns were inconsistent with real UFO behavior and labeled the clip as fabricated. One commenter claimed the footage was neither fake nor AI‑generated, though no independent verification was provided.

de.title: UFO rast über Haus hinweg und beamt einen Menschen hoch? Internet diskutiert das virale Filmmaterial zur Entführung durch Außerirdische [ANSCHAUEN]
de.summary: Ein am 14. Mai 2026 auf X/Twitter veröffentlichtes Video zeigt zwei nicht identifizierte Flugobjekte, die über Häuser hinwegfliegen, und eine scheinbar hochgebeamte Gestalt. Das Filmmaterial ist jedoch von schlechter Qualität und viele Zuschauer bezweifeln seine Authentizität. Die Reaktionen der Internetnutzer waren gemischt: Einige schlugen vor, dass es sich bei den Objekten um Möwen handeln könnte, andere meinten, die Bewegungsmuster stünden nicht im Einklang mit dem echten UFO-Verhalten und bezeichneten den Clip als erfunden. Ein Kommentator behauptete, das Filmmaterial sei weder gefälscht noch KI-generiert, obwohl keine unabhängige Bestätigung vorgelegt wurde.

en.title: UFO files | In pursuit of pies in the sky
en.summary: S. Department of War released 162 declassified documents, photos and videos on unidentified anomalous phenomena under President Donald Trump, with further releases planned through the PURSUE program. The release involves the White House, NASA, FBI, Office of the Director of National Intelligence and the All‑Domain Anomaly Resolution Office, and includes footage of UAPs over Greece, Iraq, the UAE and a football‑shaped object near Japan.

de.title: UFO-Dateien | Auf der Suche nach Kuchen im Himmel
de.summary: Das US-Kriegsministerium veröffentlichte unter Präsident Donald Trump 162 freigegebene Dokumente, Fotos und Videos zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen. Weitere Veröffentlichungen sind im Rahmen des PURSUE-Programms geplant. An der Veröffentlichung sind das Weiße Haus, die NASA, das FBI, das Büro des Direktors des Nationalen Geheimdienstes und das All-Domain Anomaly Resolution Office beteiligt. Sie umfasst Aufnahmen von UAPs über Griechenland, dem Irak, den Vereinigten Arabischen Emiraten und einem fußballförmigen Objekt in der Nähe von Japan.
